zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonet verch Llywelyn Fychan於大約1330年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，她的父親Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan62歲，母親Catrin ferch Hopkin62歲。她和Thomas ap Ivor Hael至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonet verch Llywelyn Fychan于大约1330年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，她的父亲Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan62岁，母亲Catrin ferch Hopkin62岁。她和Thomas ap Ivor Hael至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonet verch Llywelyn Fychan was born about 1330, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan, was 62 and her mother, Catrin ferch Hopkin, was 62. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Thomas ap Ivor Hael.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonet verch Llywelyn Fychan est née environ 1330, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Catrin ferch Hopkin, avait 62 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Thomas ap Ivor Hael.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jonet verch Llywelyn Fychan um 1330 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan 62 und ihre Mutter Catrin ferch Hopkin 62. Sie hatte mit Thomas ap Ivor Hael mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonet verch Llywelyn Fychan è nata il circa 1330 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan, aveva 62 anni e sua madre, Catrin ferch Hopkin, aveva 62 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Thomas ap Ivor Hael.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonet verch Llywelyn Fychanが約1330年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorganは62歳，母Catrin ferch Hopkinは62歳であった。彼女はThomas ap Ivor Haelとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonet verch Llywelyn Fychan(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan(은)는 62세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catrin ferch Hopkin(은)는 62세였다. 그녀는 Thomas ap Ivor Hael(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonet verch Llywelyn Fychan nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Catrin ferch Hopkin, tinha 62 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Thomas ap Ivor Hael.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonet verch Llywelyn Fychan родилась около 1330 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Catrin ferch Hopkin, 62. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Thomas ap Ivor Hael.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonet verch Llywelyn Fychan nació aproximadamente 1330, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Catrin ferch Hopkin, tenía 62 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Thomas ap Ivor Hael.
